raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "sharing a personal empirical observation about psychological causality",
  "implicit_claims": ["behavior exerts greater causal influence on mood than mood exerts on behavior", "this directional pattern is detectable through introspection", "the relationship is probabilistic rather than absolute"],
  "coherence_assessment": "coherent as a first-person generalization; no internal logical contradiction",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the reported pattern must hold reliably for the individual or population and interventions based on it must improve well-being",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the actual dominant causal direction is reversed or the observation reflects confirmation bias rather than stable regularities"
}
